title: TDmon
description: A datapack of Cobblemon made by DiEn.
body:
# TDmon
I don't really know what I should write down here, so I just listed what this pack got so far:

<details>
<summary>Stunfisk & Galarian Stunfisk</summary>

![Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed6a185025585f674d88ae22606845e11ec7383.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Elemental Monkeys</summary>

![The Monkey Family](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8a0545e010588039d5d960fe8e0f049cae2b62.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Victini</summary>
  
![Victini](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8158d4409cddcb85b1ed0e13643410c9838224f.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Tympole Line</summary>

![FROG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbbfd5df896462269b662ce5f9c9f08aa6415126.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Gastly Line</summary>

Models, Animations and Textures made by [Gesteyy](https://modrinth.com/user/Gesteyy), Ported and Modified by [DiEn](https://modrinth.com/user/DiEn212)
![Ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/159020f6301c30290f7276361f002f9ee8d52f4a.png)

</details>


I'm trying my best with the models, textures and animations for these guys, really hope you enjoy it!

# Spawn Info

<details>
<summary>Stunfisk & Galarian Stunfisk</summary>

Stunfisk is uncommonly found in **Swamp**, while Galarian Stunfisk is in the **Taiga forest**.

![Stunfisk in Swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e8075953b8e3d4daf5d1c784e73636b09bdd37d.png)

![Galarian Stunfisk in the forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e6cf8361566c12509e3ccb974d237298d1d73e.png)


</details>

<details>
<summary>The elemental Monkeys</summary>

All the monkeys can be rarely found in the **Jungle**, obviously.

![Monkeys Tribe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9289f229799244157d9f77e25aebf73695d46f24.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>The Victory Victini</summary>

Be sure to check the **Castle Ruin**, rumor said if you lucky enough, a Victini migh come to visit.

![Victini Chilling on top of the tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808c31a524ab3c703a499c0b23274029fd1d9ea3_0.webp)

</details>

# Installation
After downloading the Datapack, be sure to put it in your "resources" folder and "datapack" folder within your world. _or you can use [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) by [JTK222](https://modrinth.com/user/JTK222) to load the datapack automatically._
